title: aster decaphyllus
intro: Aster decaphyllus, also known as the Decapetalous Aster, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, characterized by its unique ten-petaled flowers. The medicinal properties of Aster decaphyllus lie in its roots, which contain terpenoids and flavonoids, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Aster decaphyllus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
